---
title: "Accuracy study (Exponential data, Mann-Whitney U) - Compare p-value approximation methods"
date: "Compiled at `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = 'UTC')` UTC"
output:
  github_document: default
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
always_allow_html: true
params:
  name: "02_p_approx_methods" # change if you rename file
---


```{r here, message=FALSE}
here::i_am(paste0(params$name, ".Rmd"), uuid = "b522dc4f-d47c-4984-b4b6-16d9e59a185e")
```


```{r directories}
# create or *empty* the target directory, used to write this file's data: 
#projthis::proj_create_dir_target(params$name, clean = TRUE)

# function to get path to target directory: path_target("sample.csv")
path_target <- projthis::proj_path_target(params$name)

# function to get path to previous data: path_source("00-import", "sample.csv")
path_source <- projthis::proj_path_source(params$name)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "cairo_pdf"),
  fig.ext = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.width = 10, 
  fig.height = 6, 
  dpi = 200,
  fig.path = paste0('figures/', params, "/sim_wilcox_papprox_"),
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  echo = FALSE)
```

```{r packages}
library(conflicted)
library(dplyr)
library(rlang) # For global plot theme
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(progressr)
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

conflicts_prefer(base::intersect, dplyr::filter, dplyr::select)
```

```{r}
# Global parameters
cores <- 8
set.seed(123456)
```


## Load permApprox functions

```{r permapprox-load}
proj_path <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_file("README.md"))

# Load permApprox functions
permApprox_path <- file.path(proj_path, "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/R")
permApprox_functions <- list.files(permApprox_path, pattern = "\\.R$",
                                   full.names = TRUE)
invisible(sapply(permApprox_functions, source))

# Load epsilon functions
eps_rule_path <- file.path(proj_path, 
                           "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/slls_eps_rule.R")
source(eps_rule_path)
```

## Method registry, file helpers, and per-method runner

```{r helpers}
# Root where generated data are stored
path_data <- path_source("01_data_gen")

path_acc <- file.path(path_data, "sim_accuracy_data")
path_err <- file.path(path_data, "sim_error_data")

stopifnot(dir.exists(path_acc), dir.exists(path_err))

parse_acc_file <- function(fn) {
  # sim_acc_n{n}_d{d}_nperm{nperm}.rds
  m <- stringr::str_match(basename(fn), 
                          "^sim_acc_n(\\d+)_d([0-9.]+)_nperm(\\d+)\\.rds$")
  tibble(n = as.integer(m[,2]),
         d = as.numeric(m[,3]),
         n_perm = as.integer(m[,4]),
         file = fn)
}

parse_err_file <- function(fn) {
  # sim_err_n{n}_d{d}_nperm{nperm}_pi1{pi1}.rds
  m <- stringr::str_match(basename(fn), 
                          "^sim_err_n(\\d+)_d([0-9.]+)_nperm(\\d+)_pi1([0-9.]+)\\.rds$")
  tibble(n = as.integer(m[,2]),
         d = as.numeric(m[,3]),
         n_perm = as.integer(m[,4]),
         pi1 = as.numeric(m[,5]),
         file = fn)
}

list_acc <- function() {
  fs <- list.files(path_acc, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
  purrr::map_dfr(fs, parse_acc_file) %>% arrange(n, d, n_perm)
}

list_err <- function() {
  fs <- list.files(path_err, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
  purrr::map_dfr(fs, parse_err_file) %>% arrange(n, d, n_perm, pi1)
}
```

### Relabeling helper

```{r}
# --- Dynamic relabeling helper (order-preserving) ----------------------------
# df: data frame containing a column 'method' (factor or character)
# label_map: named character vector (old -> new labels)
# my_cols: named color vector (method -> color)
# drop_unused: if TRUE, drop colors not present after relabeling
# keep_order: if TRUE, preserve the original my_cols order positions for relabeled names
rename_methods_and_colors <- function(df, label_map = NULL, my_cols,
                                      drop_unused = TRUE, keep_order = TRUE) {

  stopifnot("method" %in% names(df))
  df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(method = as.character(.data$method))

  # --- Relabel method names in the data (old -> new) ---
  if (!is.null(label_map)) {
    df$method <- ifelse(df$method %in% names(label_map),
                        label_map[df$method], df$method)
  }

  # Keep the factor order as "first appearance in df" (independent of color order)
  df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(method = factor(.data$method, levels = unique(.data$method)))

  # --- Build new color mapping ---
  cols_new <- my_cols

  if (!is.null(label_map)) {
    matched_old <- intersect(names(label_map), names(my_cols))
    # For every old label that exists in my_cols, move its color to the new name
    for (old in matched_old) {
      new <- label_map[[old]]
      cols_new[new] <- cols_new[old]
      if (drop_unused) {
        cols_new <- cols_new[setdiff(names(cols_new), old)]
      }
    }
  }

  # Optionally drop colors not present in the data
  if (drop_unused) {
    present <- unique(as.character(df$method))
    cols_new <- cols_new[names(cols_new) %in% present]
  }

  # --- Preserve original order positions for relabeled entries ---
  if (keep_order) {
    # Original order reference
    order_ref <- names(my_cols)
    # Map the original order through label_map: old -> new (if relabeled)
    order_mapped <- vapply(order_ref,
                           function(nm) if (!is.null(label_map) && nm %in% names(label_map)) label_map[[nm]] else nm,
                           FUN.VALUE = character(1))
    # Final order = order_mapped, but keep only those present in cols_new, de-duplicated in order
    final_order <- order_mapped[order_mapped %in% names(cols_new)]
    final_order <- final_order[!duplicated(final_order)]
    cols_new <- cols_new[final_order]
  }

  list(data = df, colors = cols_new)
}
```


### Method registry

Methods, we will consider in this study:

* **Wilcoxon**: Wilcoxon test (Mann-Whitney U statistic is used here) (considered as ground truth)
* **Empirical**: Empirical p-values.
* **Empirical (pow3)**: Empirical p-values where the test statistics are raised to the power 3 (just to double-check the implementation).
* **Gamma**: Gamma approximation of the complete permutation distribution, as suggested by *Winkler et al.* (2016).
* **GPD (Knijnen)**: GPD approximation as suggested by *Knijnenburg et al. (2009)*:
  + GPD parameter estimation with one-parameter maximum likelihood estimation.
  + Threshold: Failure to reject (FTR), starting with 250 exceedances.
* **GPD (Knijnen, pow3)**: Like GPD(KB), but all test statistics are raised to the power 3 before GPD approximation, as suggested by Knijnenburg et al. (2009).
* **GPD (Winkler, +obs)**: Like GPD(KB), but $t_{obs}$ is included in the permutation distribution, as suggested by *Winkler et al.* (2016).
* **GPD (pApprox, UC)**: GPD approximation with permApprox as follows:
  + GPD parameter estimation using Likelihood-Moment-Estimation (LME).
  + Unconstrained (UC) parameter estimation.
  + Threshold: Robust failure to reject (robFTR), starting with 25% exceedances.
* **GPD(pApprox, ξ≥0)**: GPD approximation with permApprox as follows:
  + GPD parameter estimation with one-parameter maximum likelihood estimation.
  + Constraint: The shape parameter $\xi$ must be non-negative.
  + Threshold: Robust failure to reject (robFTR), starting with 25% exceedances.
* **GPD (pApprox, s>obs)**: Our proposed GPD approximation:
  + GPD parameter estimation using Likelihood-Moment-Estimation (LME).
  + Constraint: The support boundary $s$ must lie above the observed test statistic.
  + Threshold: Robust failure to reject (robFTR), starting with 25% exceedances.

For comparability, we use a **fitting threshold of 0.1** in all Gamma and GPD approximation settings, which is two times the classical $\alpha$ level of 0.05. That means, the fit is done if the empirical p-value is smaller than 0.1.


```{r, echo=TRUE}
# --- General method registry --------------------------------
# Edit here to add/remove methods or change labels/controls.
# Labels must match the plotting color names.
methods_registry <- list(
  wilcoxon = list(
    label  = "Wilcoxon",
    engine = "wilcoxon",
    params = list()
  ),
  
  empirical = list(
    label = "Empirical",
    engine = "empirical",
    params = list(
      power = 1
    )
  ),

  gamma = list(
    label  = "Gamma",
    engine = "gamma",
    params = list(
      gamma_ctrl = make_gamma_ctrl(
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        gof_test      = "none",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_knijnen = list(
    label  = "GPD (Knijnen)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 250, # Start at 250 exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_knijnen_pow3 = list(
    label  = "GPD (Knijnen, pow3)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 3,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 250, # Start at 250 exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_incl_obs = list(
    label  = "GPD (Winkler, +obs)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = TRUE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 0.25, # Start at 0.25B exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),
  
  gpd_papprox_uc = list(
    label  = "GPD (pApprox, UC)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "unconstrained",
        thresh_method = "rob_ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 0.25, # Start with 25% exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 250, # Use minimum 250 exceedances
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_papprox_xi_pos = list(
    label  = "GPD (pApprox, ξ≥0)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "MLE1D",
        tol           = 1e-10,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "shape_nonneg",
        thresh_method = "rob_ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 0.25, # Start with 25% exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 250, # Use minimum 250 exceedances
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_papprox_supp_at_obs = list(
    label  = "GPD (pApprox, s>obs)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      power = 1,
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "rob_ftr", # Failure to reject
        exceed0       = 0.25, # Start with 25% exceedances
        exceed0_min   = 250, # Use minimum 250 exceedances
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10, # Increment by 10 if gof test fails
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  )
)

# Labels (used later for factor order)
method_labels <- vapply(methods_registry, `[[`, "", "label")

# move "t-test" label to the end
i_wilcox <- which(method_labels == "Wilcoxon")
method_labels <- c(method_labels[-i_wilcox], method_labels[i_wilcox])

# Filter method(s)
# methods_registry_sub <- list(
#   gamma = methods_registry$gamma
# )
# methods_registry <- methods_registry_sub
```

### Engines

```{r, echo=TRUE}
# Engine for the Wilcoxon / Mann-Whitney U test
.engine_wilcox <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                           method_key, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    # U data: columns 1:n_perm, "uobs", "p_wilcox"
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "uobs", "p_wilcox")
    
    tibble(
      study    = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep      = rep_id,
      test_idx = seq_len(n_test),
      method   = label,
      pval     = as.numeric(panel[, "p_wilcox"]),  # asymptotic Wilcoxon p
      gpd_shape = NA_real_,
      gpd_scale = NA_real_,
      gpd_bound = NA_real_,
      meth_used = NA_character_,
      n_exceed  = NA_integer_
    )
  })
}


.engine_empirical <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                              method_key, params, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  power <- params$power
  
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "uobs", "p_wilcox")
    
    perm_mat <- t(as.matrix(panel[, seq_len(n_perm), drop = FALSE]))  # (B x m)
    tobs_vec <- as.numeric(panel[, "uobs"])
    
    fit <- compute_p_values(
      obs_stats     = tobs_vec,
      perm_stats    = perm_mat,
      alternative   = "two_sided",
      null_center   = "mean",
      method        = "empirical",
      power         = power,
      adjust_method = "none"
    )
    
    tibble(
      study     = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep       = rep_id,
      test_idx  = seq_len(n_test),
      method    = label,
      pval      = fit$p_unadjusted,
      gpd_shape = NA_real_,
      gpd_scale = NA_real_,
      gpd_bound = NA_real_,
      meth_used = fit$method_used,
      n_exceed  = NA_integer_
    )
  })
}

.engine_gamma <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                              method_key, params, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  gamma_ctrl <- params$gamma_ctrl
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "uobs", "p_wilcox")
    
    perm_mat <- t(as.matrix(panel[, seq_len(n_perm), drop = FALSE]))  # (B x m)
    tobs_vec <- as.numeric(panel[, "uobs"])
    
    fit <- compute_p_values(
      obs_stats     = (tobs_vec/100),
      perm_stats    = (perm_mat/100),# Gamma fit fails if test statistics are too large
      alternative   = "two_sided",
      null_center   = "mean", 
      method        = "gamma",
      fit_thresh    = 0.1, # Twice the standard alpha level
      gamma_ctrl    = gamma_ctrl, 
      adjust_method = "none"
    )
    
    tibble(
      study     = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep       = rep_id,
      test_idx  = seq_len(n_test),
      method    = label,
      pval      = fit$p_unadjusted,
      gpd_shape = NA_real_,
      gpd_scale = NA_real_,
      gpd_bound = NA_real_,
      meth_used = fit$method_used,
      n_exceed  = NA_integer_
    )
  })
}

.engine_gpd <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                        method_key, params, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  gpd_ctrl <- params$gpd_ctrl
  power <- params$power
  
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "uobs", "p_wilcox")
    
    perm_mat <- t(as.matrix(panel[, seq_len(n_perm), drop = FALSE]))  # (B x m)
    tobs_vec <- as.numeric(panel[, "uobs"])

    fit <- compute_p_values(
      obs_stats     = tobs_vec,
      perm_stats    = perm_mat,
      eps_fct       = eps_slls_perm,
      sampsize      = n,
      alternative   = "two_sided",
      null_center   = "mean",
      method        = "gpd",
      fit_thresh    = 0.1, # Twice the alpha level
      power         = power,
      gpd_ctrl      = gpd_ctrl,
      adjust_method = "none"
    )
    
    if(!is.null(fit$gpd_fit)) {
      shape <- fit$gpd_fit$shape
      scale <- fit$gpd_fit$scale
      bound <- ifelse(shape < 0, -scale / shape, NA_real_)
    } else {
      shape <- scale <- bound <- NA_real_
    }
    
    tibble(
      study     = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep       = rep_id,
      test_idx  = seq_len(n_test),
      method    = label,
      pval      = fit$p_unadjusted,
      gpd_shape = shape,
      gpd_scale = scale,
      gpd_bound = bound,
      meth_used = fit$method_used,
      n_exceed  = fit$gpd_fit$n_exceed
    )
  })
}

# (Other engines like empirical/custom can be added here)

# --- Dispatcher ---------------------------------------------------------------
run_method_engine <- function(method_key, def, lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, 
                              study_str, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  engine <- def$engine
  label  <- def$label
  params <- def$params %||% list()
  
  switch(engine,
         wilcoxon  = .engine_wilcox(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, 
                                   label, method_key, pi1),
         empirical = .engine_empirical(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, 
                                       label, method_key, params, pi1),
         gamma     = .engine_gamma(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, 
                                   label, method_key, params, pi1),
         gpd       = .engine_gpd(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, 
                                 label, method_key, params, pi1),
         stop(sprintf("Unknown engine: %s", engine))
  )
}
```

### Output path builders

```{r}
path_results <- path_target()

.method_out_file <- function(study_str, method_key, n, d, n_perm, 
                             pi1 = NA_real_) {
  dir.create(file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key), 
             recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  if (is.na(pi1)) {
    file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key,
              sprintf("%s_pvals_%s_n%d_d%.1f_nperm%d.rds", study_str, 
                      method_key, n, d, n_perm))
  } else {
    file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key,
              sprintf("%s_pvals_%s_n%d_d%.1f_nperm%d_pi1%.3f.rds", 
                      study_str, method_key, n, d, n_perm, pi1))
  }
}
```

## ACCURACY

### Compute p-values and save

```{r accuracy-run, eval=FALSE}
# grid with settings
acc_grid <- list_acc()

handlers("txtprogressbar")
plan(multisession, workers = cores)

base_out <- file.path(path_results, "accuracy")
dir.create(base_out, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

with_progress({
  p <- progressor(steps = nrow(acc_grid) * length(methods_registry))

  furrr::future_walk(
    split(acc_grid, seq_len(nrow(acc_grid))),
    function(row) {
      row <- as_tibble(row)
      n      <- row$n[[1]]
      d      <- row$d[[1]]
      n_perm <- row$n_perm[[1]]
      f_in   <- row$file[[1]]
      study_str <- "accuracy"

      lst <- readRDS(f_in)

      purrr::iwalk(methods_registry, function(def, key) {
        f_out <- .method_out_file(study_str, key, n, d, n_perm)
        if (!file.exists(f_out)) {
          res <- run_method_engine(
            method_key = key, def = def,
            lst_panels = lst, n = n, d = d, n_perm = n_perm,
            study_str = study_str
          )
          saveRDS(res, f_out)
        }
        p()
      })
    },
    .options = furrr::furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
  )
})

plan(sequential)
```

### Collect & reshape

```{r accuracy-collect}
# Collect all method files for ACCURACY
acc_method_root <- file.path(path_results, "accuracy") 
acc_files <- list.files(acc_method_root, pattern = "\\.rds$", 
                        recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE) 

acc_res <- purrr::map_dfr(acc_files, readRDS) %>% 
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = unname(method_labels)))

# Data frame used for plotting 
acc_all <- acc_res %>% 
  select(study, n, d, n_perm, rep, test_idx, method, pval) %>%
  rename(B = n_perm) # n_perm is denoted as B in the following
```

### Plotting helper

```{r}
plot_permapprox <- function(acc_df,
                            type = c("pval", "ratio"),
                            x = c("n", "d", "B"),
                            xlab = NULL,
                            fixed = list(),            # e.g. list(d = 1, B = 1000)
                            my_cols,
                            theme_params = list(),
                            # --- zero handling / display (shared) ---
                            zero_floor_factor = 1e-3,
                            breaks = NULL,
                            breaks_incl = NULL,
                            y_min = 1e-300,
                            y_max = 1e+300,
                            y_step_size = 20,
                            jitter_width = 0.08,
                            dodge_width  = 0.75,
                            point_size = 2,
                            boxplot_median_linewidth = 1,
                            show_zero_labels = TRUE,
                            zero_anchor_mode = c("min","bottom","top","fixed"),
                            zero_vshift_decades = 0.0,
                            zero_stack_direction = c("down","up"),
                            zero_gap_decades = 0.35,
                            zero_text_size = 5.5,
                            zero_text_hjust = 0,       # 0 = left aligned
                            zero_fixed_value = NULL,   # if anchor_mode == "fixed"
                            auto_expand_limits = TRUE,
                            legend_position = "bottom",
                            legend_point_size = 3.5,
                            legend_rows = NULL,
                            legend_box = TRUE,
                            # --- p-value branch only ---
                            include_zeros_in_boxplot = TRUE) {

  stopifnot(all(c("n","d","B","method","pval") %in% names(acc_df)))
  type <- match.arg(type); x <- match.arg(x)
  zero_anchor_mode     <- match.arg(zero_anchor_mode)
  zero_stack_direction <- match.arg(zero_stack_direction)

  # ---------------- Shared helpers ----------------
  .apply_slice <- function(df, x, fixed) {
    defaults <- list(n = 100, d = 1, B = 1000)
    fixed <- utils::modifyList(defaults, fixed)
    if (x != "n") df <- dplyr::filter(df, .data$n == fixed$n)
    if (x != "d") df <- dplyr::filter(df, .data$d == fixed$d)
    if (x != "B") df <- dplyr::filter(df, .data$B == fixed$B)
    df
  }

  .breaks <- function(y_min, y_max, y_step_size, base_breaks = NULL) {
    if (!is.null(base_breaks)) {
      b <- base_breaks
    } else {
      max_exp <- 300
      exps <- c(seq(-y_step_size, -max_exp, by = -y_step_size),
                0,
                seq( y_step_size,  max_exp, by =  y_step_size))
      b <- 10^exps
      b <- c(breaks_incl, b)
    }
    sort(unique(b[b <= y_max & b >= y_min]))
  }

  .stack_y <- function(tbl, anchor_tbl, xcol, line_col = "line",
                       vshift_dec = 0, gap_dec = 0.35,
                       direction = c("down","up")) {
    direction <- match.arg(direction)
    j <- dplyr::left_join(tbl, anchor_tbl, by = xcol) # adds y_anchor
    if (!"y_anchor" %in% names(j) || all(!is.finite(j$y_anchor))) return(NULL)
    if (direction == "down") {
      j$y <- j$y_anchor * 10^(- (j[[line_col]] * gap_dec + vshift_dec))
    } else {
      j$y <- j$y_anchor * 10^(  (j[[line_col]] * gap_dec + vshift_dec))
    }
    j
  }

  .anchor_tbl <- function(anchor_mode, df_vals, x, y_col, brks = numeric(),
                          fixed_value = NULL) {
    switch(anchor_mode,
      min = df_vals %>%
        dplyr::group_by(.data[[x]]) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(y_anchor = min(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 
                         .groups = "drop"),
      bottom = tibble::tibble(
        !!x := sort(unique(df_vals[[x]])),
        y_anchor = if (length(brks)) min(brks) else min(df_vals[[y_col]], 
                                                        na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      top = tibble::tibble(
        !!x := sort(unique(df_vals[[x]])),
        y_anchor = if (length(brks)) max(brks) else max(df_vals[[y_col]], 
                                                        na.rm = TRUE)
      ),
      fixed = {
        stopifnot(is.numeric(fixed_value), length(fixed_value) == 1L, is.finite(fixed_value))
        tibble::tibble( !!x := sort(unique(df_vals[[x]])), y_anchor = fixed_value)
      }
    )
  }

  .zero_counts <- function(df, x, method_levels, baseline = NULL) {
    z <- df
    if (!is.null(baseline)) z <- dplyr::filter(z, .data$method != baseline)
    z %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[x]], .data$method) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(n_zero = sum(.data$pval == 0, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$n_zero > 0) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(method = factor(.data$method, levels = method_levels)) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(.data[[x]], .data$method) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[x]]) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(line = dplyr::row_number() - 1L) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  # ---------------- Prep slice ----------------
  df <- .apply_slice(acc_df, x, fixed)
  if (!nrow(df)) stop("No rows after filtering. Adjust 'fixed = list(...)' to existing settings.")
  df <- dplyr::mutate(df, method = factor(.data$method, levels = names(my_cols)))

  # ---------- Legend alignment across branches (identical scales) -------------
  method_levels <- names(my_cols)
  
  legend_rows <- ifelse(is.null(legend_rows), length(method_levels), legend_rows)
  
  # legend_breaks: show all methods in pval plot, but exclude ground truth in ratio plot
  if (type == "pval") {
    legend_breaks <- method_levels
  } else {
    legend_breaks <- setdiff(method_levels, "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)")
  }
  
  # ---------- Bold selected legend labels -------------------------------------
  bold_methods <- c("GPD (permApprox)", "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)")
  legend_labels <- setNames(
    lapply(method_levels, function(m) {
      if (m %in% bold_methods) {
        bquote(bold(.(m)))
      } else {
        m
      }
    }),
    method_levels
  )
  
  # Reusable guides (same in both branches)
  guide_common <- guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      title = NULL, 
      nrow = ifelse(is.null(legend_rows), length(legend_breaks), legend_rows), 
      byrow = FALSE,
      override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size)
    ),
    fill = guide_legend(
      title = NULL, 
      nrow = ifelse(is.null(legend_rows), length(legend_breaks), legend_rows), 
      byrow = FALSE,
      override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size)
    )
  )

  # ============================================================
  # P-VALUE PLOT
  # ============================================================
  if (type == "pval") {
    min_nonzero <- suppressWarnings(min(df$pval[df$pval > 0], na.rm = TRUE))
    if (!is.finite(min_nonzero)) min_nonzero <- 1e-320
    p_floor <- min_nonzero * zero_floor_factor

    df <- dplyr::mutate(df, pval_plot = dplyr::if_else(pval == 0, p_floor, pval, missing = pval))

    df_points <- df
    df_boxes  <- if (include_zeros_in_boxplot) df else dplyr::filter(df, .data$pval > 0)

    brks <- .breaks(y_min, y_max, y_step_size, breaks)
    has_zero <- any(df$pval == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (has_zero) brks <- sort(unique(c(p_floor, brks)))
    y_labs <- function(v) if (has_zero) {
      ifelse(v < p_floor * 1.1, "0", paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v))))
    } else paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v)))

    p <- ggplot(mapping = aes(x = factor(.data[[x]]))) +
      geom_point(
        data = df_points,
        aes(y = .data$pval_plot, color = .data$method, fill = .data$method),
        size = point_size, alpha = 0.9,
        position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = jitter_width,
                                        dodge.width  = dodge_width)
      ) +
      geom_boxplot(
        data = df_boxes,
        aes(y = .data$pval_plot, group = interaction(.data$method, .data[[x]])),
        fill = NA, color = "black", width = 0.65, 
        median.linewidth = boxplot_median_linewidth,
        outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
        show.legend = FALSE
      )

    # stacked zero labels
    stacked <- NULL
    if (show_zero_labels) {
      zero_counts <- .zero_counts(df %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(x,"method","pval"))),
                                  x, method_levels = method_levels)
      if (nrow(zero_counts)) {
        anchor_tbl <- .anchor_tbl(zero_anchor_mode,
                                  df_vals = df, x = x, y_col = "pval_plot",
                                  brks = brks, fixed_value = zero_fixed_value)
        stacked <- .stack_y(zero_counts, anchor_tbl, xcol = x,
                            vshift_dec = zero_vshift_decades,
                            gap_dec    = zero_gap_decades,
                            direction  = zero_stack_direction)
        if (!is.null(stacked) && nrow(stacked)) {
          p <- p + geom_text(
            data = stacked,
            aes(x = factor(.data[[x]]), y = .data$y,
                label = paste0("0s=", .data$n_zero), color = .data$method),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE, size = zero_text_size, 
            hjust = zero_text_hjust
          )
        }
      }
    }

    if (auto_expand_limits && !is.null(stacked) && nrow(stacked)) {
      y_min <- min(c(y_min, stacked$y), na.rm = TRUE)
      y_max <- max(c(y_max, stacked$y), na.rm = TRUE)
    }

    p <- p +
      scale_fill_manual(
        "Method",
        values = my_cols,
        limits = method_levels,
        breaks = legend_breaks,
        labels = legend_labels[legend_breaks],
        drop = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(
        "Method",
        values = my_cols,
        limits = method_levels,
        breaks = legend_breaks,
        labels = legend_labels[legend_breaks],
        drop = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_y_log10(breaks = brks, labels = y_labs, limits = c(y_min, y_max)) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = ifelse(is.null(xlab), x, xlab),
           y = expression(p)) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      do.call(theme, c(theme_params, list(
        legend.position = legend_position,
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      ))) +
      guide_common
    
    if (isTRUE(legend_box)) {
      p <- p + theme(
        legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
        legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black")
      )
    }
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  # ============================================================
  # RATIO PLOT (method / Wilcoxon), with constant zero marker
  # ============================================================
  df_base <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(n, d, B,
                  !!rlang::sym(x), rep, test_idx,
                  method, pval)
  
  zero_counts_r_orig <- .zero_counts(df_base, x, method_levels = method_levels, 
                                     baseline = "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)")
  
  min_nonzero_all <- suppressWarnings(min(df_base$pval[df_base$pval > 0], na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(min_nonzero_all)) min_nonzero_all <- 1e-320
  p_floor_all <- min_nonzero_all * zero_floor_factor
  
  ratio_zero_value <- p_floor_all
  
  df_wide_p <- tidyr::pivot_wider(df_base, names_from = method, values_from = pval)
  df_wide_z <- tidyr::pivot_wider(
    df_base,
    names_from = method,
    values_from = pval,
    values_fn = list(pval = function(v) any(v == 0)),
    values_fill = FALSE
  )
  nf <- !(names(df_wide_z) %in% c("n","d","B",x,"rep","test_idx"))
  names(df_wide_z)[nf] <- paste0(names(df_wide_z)[nf], "__iszero")

  methods_to_compare <- intersect(method_levels, 
                                  setdiff(unique(as.character(df$method)), 
                                          "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)"))
  if (!length(methods_to_compare)) 
    stop("No methods to compare against Wilcoxon in this subset.")

  join_keys <- unique(c("n","d","B", x, "rep","test_idx","method"))

  df_ratio <- df_wide_p %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = tidyselect::all_of(methods_to_compare),
                        names_to = "method", values_to = "p_method") %>%
    dplyr::rename(p_wilcox = `Ground truth (Wilcoxon)`) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      df_wide_z %>%
        tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = tidyselect::all_of(paste0(methods_to_compare,"__iszero")),
                            names_to = "method_z", 
                            values_to = "is_zero_method") %>%
        dplyr::mutate(method = sub("__iszero$","", .data$method_z)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-method_z),
      by = join_keys
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      p_method_plot = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_method == 0, p_floor_all, .data$p_method),
      p_wilcox_plot = dplyr::if_else(.data$p_wilcox == 0, p_floor_all, .data$p_wilcox),
      ratio_raw     = .data$p_method_plot / .data$p_wilcox_plot,
      ratio         = dplyr::if_else(.data$is_zero_method, ratio_zero_value, ratio_raw),
      method        = factor(.data$method, levels = method_levels)
    )
  
  if (!nrow(df_ratio))
    stop("No pairs for ratio plot after filtering. Try a different 'fixed' combination.")
  
  brks_r <- .breaks(y_min, y_max, y_step_size, breaks)
  brks_r <- sort(unique(c(ratio_zero_value, brks_r)))
  lab_plain <- function(v) ifelse(v <= ratio_zero_value * 1.1, "0",
                                  paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v))))
  
  p <- ggplot(mapping = aes(x = factor(.data[[x]]))) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linewidth = 0.5, linetype = 2, color = "grey50") +
    geom_point(
      data = df_ratio,
      aes(y = .data$ratio, color = .data$method, fill = .data$method),
      size = point_size, alpha = 0.9,
      position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = jitter_width,
                                      dodge.width  = dodge_width)
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = df_ratio,
      aes(y = .data$ratio, group = interaction(.data$method, .data[[x]])),
      fill = NA, color = "black", width = 0.65,
      median.linewidth = boxplot_median_linewidth,
      outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
      show.legend = FALSE
    )
  
  # Zero annotations
  stacked_r <- NULL
  if (show_zero_labels && nrow(zero_counts_r_orig)) {
    anchor_tbl_r <- .anchor_tbl(zero_anchor_mode,
                                df_vals = df_ratio %>% dplyr::select(!!rlang::sym(x), 
                                                                     value = ratio),
                                x = x, y_col = "value",
                                brks = brks_r, fixed_value = zero_fixed_value)
    stacked_r <- .stack_y(zero_counts_r_orig, anchor_tbl_r, xcol = x,
                          vshift_dec = zero_vshift_decades,
                          gap_dec    = zero_gap_decades,
                          direction  = zero_stack_direction)
    if (!is.null(stacked_r) && nrow(stacked_r)) {
      p <- p + geom_text(
        data = stacked_r,
        aes(x = factor(.data[[x]]), y = .data$y,
            label = paste0("0s=", .data$n_zero), color = .data$method),
        inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE, size = zero_text_size,
        hjust = zero_text_hjust
      )
    }
  }

  if (auto_expand_limits && !is.null(stacked_r) && nrow(stacked_r)) {
    y_min <- min(c(y_min, stacked_r$y), na.rm = TRUE)
    y_max <- max(c(y_max, stacked_r$y), na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    scale_fill_manual(
      "Method",
      values = my_cols,
      limits = method_levels,
      breaks = legend_breaks,
      labels = legend_labels[legend_breaks],
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      "Method",
      values = my_cols,
      limits = method_levels,
      breaks = legend_breaks,
      labels = legend_labels[legend_breaks],
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_y_log10(breaks = brks_r, labels = lab_plain, limits = c(y_min, y_max)) +
    labs(title = "",
         x = ifelse(is.null(xlab), x, xlab),
         y = expression(p[method] / p[Wilcoxon])) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    do.call(theme, c(theme_params, list(
      legend.position = legend_position,
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ))) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(title = NULL,
                           nrow = ifelse(is.null(legend_rows), 
                                         length(legend_breaks), 
                                         legend_rows), byrow = FALSE,
                           override.aes = list(alpha = 1, 
                                               size = legend_point_size,
                                               shape = 21, 
                                               stroke = 0)),
      fill  = guide_legend(title = NULL,
                           nrow = ifelse(is.null(legend_rows), 
                                         length(legend_breaks), 
                                         legend_rows), byrow = FALSE,
                           override.aes = list(alpha = 1,
                                               size = legend_point_size,
                                               shape = 21, stroke = 0))
    )
  
  if (isTRUE(legend_box)) {
    p <- p + theme(
      legend.background     = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
      legend.key            = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black")
    )
  }
  
  return(p)
}


```


### Filter, rename +  colors

```{r pvals_by_n_permapprox}
my_cols <- c(
  "Gamma"                   = "#009E73", 
  "GPD (Knijnenburg)"       = "#56B4E9", 
  "GPD (Knijnenburg, pow3)" = "#0072B2",
  "GPD (Winkler, +obs)"     = "#E69F00", 
  "GPD (permApprox)"        = "#CC79A7",
  "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)" = "gray30"
)

# Rename permApprox methods for the plots (old = new)
label_map <- c(
  "GPD (pApprox, s>obs)"      = "GPD (permApprox)",
  "GPD (Knijnen)"             = "GPD (Knijnenburg)",
  "GPD (Knijnen, pow3)"       = "GPD (Knijnenburg, pow3)",
  "Wilcoxon"                  = "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)"
)

renamed <- rename_methods_and_colors(acc_all, label_map = label_map, 
                                     my_cols = my_cols, drop_unused = FALSE)
acc_renamed  <- renamed$data

# Filter methods
acc_filt <- acc_renamed %>% 
  filter(method %in% c("Ground truth (Wilcoxon)", "Gamma", 
                       "GPD (Knijnenburg)", "GPD (Knijnenburg, pow3)",
                       "GPD (Winkler, +obs)", "GPD (permApprox)"))

col_palette <- c(black       = "black", 
                 lightgray   = "gray70",
                 gray        = "#6C6C6C",
                 darkgray    = "gray30",
                 yellow      = "#F0E442",
                 lightorange = "#E69F00",
                 darkorange  = "#D55E00",
                 lightblue   = "#56B4E9", 
                 darkblue    = "#0072B2",
                 lightgreen  = "#B2DF8A", # no okabe ito
                 green       = "#009E73",
                 green2      = "#33A02C", # no okabe ito
                 pink        = "#CC79A7")

theme_params <- list(
  axis.text       = element_text(size = 16),
  axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.title      = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.text     = element_text(size = 17),
  legend.title    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
  plot.title      = element_text(size = 1)
)
```

### By sample size (n)

#### P-values

```{r pvals_by_n, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 6, dpi = 200}
acc_filt %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "pval", x = "n",
                  fixed = list(d = 1, B = 1000), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-60, y_max = 1, y_step_size = 10,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 2, zero_gap_decades = 3,
                  legend_position = c(0.22, 0.35))
```


#### Ratios (method vs. Wilcoxon)

Ratios ($p_{method}$ / $p_{wilcox}$) for non-zero p-values, with sample size on the x axis.

```{r ratios_by_n, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 6, dpi = 200}
acc_filt %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "ratio", x = "n",
                  fixed = list(d = 1, B = 1000), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-50, y_max = 1e60, y_step_size = 10,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 4, zero_gap_decades = 6,
                  legend_position = c(0.22, 0.8), legend_rows = 5)
```

### P-values by d and B

```{r pvals_by_d_and_B, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 6.2, dpi = 200}
pvals_by_d <- acc_filt %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "pval", x = "d",
                  fixed = list(n = 100, B = 1000), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-45, y_max = 1, y_step_size = 10,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 2, zero_gap_decades = 3,
                  legend_rows = 2, legend_box = FALSE)

pvals_by_B <- acc_filt %>%
  filter(n %in% c(50, 100, 250, 500, 750, 1000)) %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "pval", x = "B",
                  fixed = list(n = 100, d = 1), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-29, y_max = 1, y_step_size = 5,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 1, zero_gap_decades = 2,
                  legend_rows = 2, legend_box = FALSE)

pvals_by_d + pvals_by_B +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

### Ratios by d and B

```{r ratios_by_d_and_B, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 6, dpi = 200}
ratios_by_d <- acc_filt %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "ratio", x = "d",
                  fixed = list(n = 100, B = 1000), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-40, y_max = 1e20, y_step_size = 10,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 2.5, zero_gap_decades = 3.5,
                  legend_rows = 1, legend_box = FALSE)

ratios_by_B <- acc_filt %>%
  plot_permapprox(type = "ratio", x = "B",
                  fixed = list(n = 100, d = 1), point_size = 1.5,
                  my_cols = my_cols, theme_params = theme_params,
                  y_min = 1e-28, y_max = 1e10, y_step_size = 5,
                  zero_vshift_decades = 1.5, zero_gap_decades = 2.2,
                  legend_rows = 1, legend_box = FALSE)

ratios_by_d + ratios_by_B +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```


### Table: Accuracy metrics

```{r}
# --- Accuracy metrics helper (Wilcoxon = ground truth) --------------------------
# data_methods: data frame with columns n,d,B,rep,test_idx,method,pval
# baseline: (optional) rows containing the Wilcoxon baseline with the same keys.
#           If NULL, the function tries to find baseline inside data_methods.
acc_metrics_summary <- function(data_methods,
                                group_vars = c("n","method"),
                                baseline = NULL) {

  keys <- c("n","d","B","rep","test_idx")
  stopifnot(all(c(keys,"method","pval") %in% names(data_methods)))

  # Prepare/locate baseline (Wilcoxon)
  if (is.null(baseline)) {
    baseline <- data_methods %>% dplyr::filter(method == "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)")
    if (nrow(baseline) == 0L)
      stop("No Wilcoxon baseline found. Pass it via `baseline=` or include it in `data_methods`.")
  } else {
    stopifnot(all(c(keys,"pval") %in% names(baseline)))
  }

  # Methods (exclude Wilcoxon)
  df_m <- data_methods %>%
    dplyr::filter(method != "Ground truth (Wilcoxon)") %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(keys), method, p_method = pval)

  # Baseline
  df_t <- baseline %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(keys), p_wilcox = pval)
  
  # Pair up by keys
  long <- dplyr::inner_join(df_m, df_t, by = keys) %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(p_method), is.finite(p_wilcox)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(diff = p_method - p_wilcox)

  # Ratios on strictly positive pairs
  long_pos <- long %>%
    dplyr::filter(p_method > 0, p_wilcox > 0) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(log10_ratio = log10(p_method / p_wilcox))

  sum_core <- long %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(group_vars))) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      N         = dplyr::n(),
      bias      = mean(diff),
      sd        = stats::sd(diff),
      rmse      = sqrt(mean(diff^2)),
      cor_spear = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(p_method, p_wilcox, method = "spearman")),
      .groups   = "drop"
    )

  sum_ratio <- long_pos %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(group_vars))) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      N_pos          = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  dplyr::left_join(sum_core, sum_ratio, by = group_vars)
}
```


```{r accuracy-metrics-by-n}
# setting: d=1, B=1000
acc_for_metrics <- acc_filt %>% dplyr::filter(d == 1, B == 1000)

tab_metrics_by_n <- acc_metrics_summary(
  data_methods = acc_for_metrics,
  group_vars   = c("n","method")
) %>% dplyr::arrange(n, method)

tab_metrics_by_n_fmt <- tab_metrics_by_n %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(bias, sd, rmse),
      ~ format(.x, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    dplyr::across(
      c(cor_spear),
      ~ format(round(.x, 3), nsmall = 3)
    )
  )

knitr::kable(tab_metrics_by_n_fmt,
  caption = "Accuracy vs. Wilcoxon by n (d=1, B=1000).") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_classic(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r accuracy-metrics-all}
tab_metrics_all <- acc_metrics_summary(
  data_methods = acc_filt,                    # contains Wilcoxon too
  group_vars   = c("n","d","B","method")
) %>% dplyr::arrange(n, d, B, method)

tab_metrics_all_fmt <- tab_metrics_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      c(bias, sd, rmse),
      ~ format(.x, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
    ),
    dplyr::across(
      c(cor_spear),
      ~ format(round(.x, 3), nsmall = 3)
    )
  )

knitr::kable(tab_metrics_all_fmt,
  caption = "Accuracy vs. Wilcoxon across all settings.") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_classic(full_width = FALSE)
```

## Files written

These files have been written to the target directory, ```r paste0("data/", params$name)```:

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target())
```
